Body.Html:
CST2000 is a class about nothing because it doesn't exists. Why are you reading fixture data?
This is a demo of the templating system:
lab1-monthDate: 25
lab1-month: September
lab1-monthShort: Sep
lab1-weekDays: Wednesday
lab1-weekDaysShort: Wed
lab1-iso8601: 2024-09-26T03:59:00.000Z
lab1-date: Wed Sep 25 2024
quiz1-monthDate: 25
quiz1-month: September
quiz1-monthShort: Sep
quiz1-weekDays: Wednesday
quiz1-weekDaysShort: Wed
quiz1-iso8601: 2024-09-26T03:59:00.000Z
quiz1-date: Wed Sep 25 2024
